prompt:
Given the case description, identify the MOST relevant CRISPR delivery method from the options below:

a. Plasmid Transfection
b. Lentivirus/Retrovirus
c. RNP/mRNA electroporation
d. RNP/mRNA microinjection
e. mRNA LNP
f. AAV

Category: Primary cell
Case Description: I hope to edit Primary macrophage

Please provide your response as follows:
- Most relevant method (select one letter a-f):
agent_prompt:
Given the case description, identify the MOST relevant CRISPR delivery method from the options below:

a. Plasmid Transfection
b. Lentivirus/Retrovirus
c. RNP/mRNA electroporation
d. RNP/mRNA microinjection
e. mRNA LNP
f. AAV

Category: Primary cell
Case Description: I hope to edit Primary macrophage

Please provide your response as follows:
- Most relevant method (select one letter a-f):

[Eval1 Answer Contract]
- You may include brief notes outside tags.
- Put the final answer in exactly one <solution>...</solution> block.
- Inside <solution>, include only the final answer string.
- Do not include extra tags inside <solution>.
raw_response:
Thinking and reasoning:
Primary macrophages are primary, hard-to-transfect cells and are often non-dividing or terminally differentiated. Plasmid transfection is typically inefficient. Retroviruses require cell division, so they're less suitable; lentiviruses (a subtype listed) can transduce non-dividing primary cells effectively and are commonly used for stable delivery in primary macrophages. RNP/mRNA electroporation can work for some primary cells but often causes viability issues in macrophages and is less commonly used as the first-line method. Microinjection is impractical for populations of primary macrophages. mRNA LNP is mainly for in vivo delivery to hepatocytes and other tissues and is not the standard choice for primary macrophage editing ex vivo. AAV has limited efficiency and cassette size constraints for Cas9 in macrophages. Therefore the most relevant option is lentiviral delivery.

Plan:
1. [ ] Identify key properties of primary macrophages relevant to delivery
2. [ ] Evaluate each delivery option against those properties
3. [ ] Select the most appropriate delivery method

Progress:
1. [✓] Identify key properties of primary macrophages relevant to delivery (completed)
2. [✓] Evaluate each delivery option against those properties (completed)
3. [✓] Select the most appropriate delivery method (completed)

<solution>b</solution>
